Hardware Component File

GENERIC ABS

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference GENERIC_ABS.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol KWP2000
Baudrate N/A
Send ID N/A
Receive ID N/A
Functional Addr 01
Functional Name ABS

ReadDTC I/O Sequence

Reply Bytes 5700000000
